projectDescription: Consio is an AI-powered voice calling platform for e-commerce brands that automates outbound sales campaigns, handles inbound calls, attributes revenue to conversations, and integrates with Shopify and leading helpdesk tools.
keyFeatures: Inbound call handling with AI agents
Revenue attribution per call, message, or voicemail
Integrations with Klaviyo, Gorgias, Zendesk, and more
Paginated call history API with rich filtering
Campaign contact-hour controls and dial-attempt limits
publicApiSurface: GET /v1/{workspace_slug}/calls — paginated call history with filtering by date, agent, campaign, direction, state
GET /v1/{workspace_slug}/attributed-orders — paginated attributed orders with date range and attribution-source filtering
ApiKeyBearer — Bearer token authentication using a csk_… API key
